notes: BMS-986515 (Juno / BMS) — healthy-donor allogeneic CD19 CAR-T basket for severe, refractory autoimmune diseases. Trial title and conditions field name only the generic phrase 'autoimmune diseases', so the rule-based classifier lands it in the slate Basket/Multidisease bucket. The product's documented clinical-development plan covers classical-rheum CTD/IIM (SLE, SSc, dermatomyositis/polymyositis), so we manually enumerate those constituents — `is_classical_rheum_basket` then returns True and `_disease_family` routes the trial to the rheum-blue 'Rheumatology basket' wedge alongside the autologous CD19 rheum baskets.
